Package index

Functions

All exported functions in VaccineValidateR.

create_cohort()
Generate Cohort List with Age Calculations
select_immunizations()
Filter and Process Immunization Data
validate_immunizations()
Evaluate Immunizations Against ACIP Schedule
evaluate_visits()
Evaluate Visits for Immunization Status
evaluate_population()
Evaluate Population-Level Immunization Metrics
summarize_population()
Summarize Population-Level Immunization Metrics
summarize_visits()
Summarize Visit-Level Immunization Evaluations
build_cvx_map()
Build CVX Mapping List
CVX
CVX Mapping
supported_antigens()
Returns the list of Antigens the system is capable of interpreting
update_cvx_map()
Update the CVX Mapping
apply_dob()
Ensure DOB is present in a data.table
